name: account.subscribed-calendar
title: Account:Subscribed Calendar
description: The declaration to configure a subscribed calendar.

payload.content: A subscribed calendar configuration defines a subscribed calendar for a user.

payloadkeys.title: Account Name
payloadkeys.content: The name that apps show to the user for this calendar account. If not present, the system generates a suitable default.

payloadkeys.title: Calendar URL
payloadkeys.content: The URL of the subscribed calendar, which needs to start with `https://`.

payloadkeys.title: Authentication Credentials Asset Reference
payloadkeys.content: The identifier of an asset declaration that contains the credentials for this account to authenticate with a calendar server. Set the corresponding asset type to `CredentialUserNameAndPassword`.
